note: This manifest lists the components in the htmdx React runtime (dist/browser.js and the module entries): the built-in catalog plus the shadcn/ui pack. shadcn components allow nested composition and markdown bodies; builtin components keep their declared body format. Attributes are data only: class -> className, kebab-case -> camelCase, values parse as booleans/numbers/JSON. Imports, expressions, and function-valued props cannot be expressed.

components.name: ExecutiveSummary
components.purpose: Summarize the artifact’s most important conclusion or recommendation.
components.example:
<ExecutiveSummary>
Ship **one HTML file** with editable HTMDX source.
</ExecutiveSummary>

components.name: Callout
components.purpose: Emphasize an important note, warning, or takeaway.

components.name: SourceQuote
components.purpose: Display a quotation or excerpt attributed in the surrounding content.

components.name: MetricStrip
components.purpose: Show a compact set of labeled headline values. A leading trend glyph (↑ up/green, ↓ down/red, ⊘ guardrail/amber) is colored automatically; an ` — ` or ` · ` in the value renders the remainder as a muted caption.
components.example:
<MetricStrip>
- ↑ Active stores using upload: **baseline 0** — post-launch adopter cohort
- ↓ File-upload support tickets: **55** · 3 months post-launch
- ⊘ Buyer checkout-completion rate: **guardrail** — hold at or above baseline
</MetricStrip>

components.name: Stat
components.purpose: Highlight one or more labeled statistics.

components.name: ChartBar
components.purpose: Compare non-negative numeric values with a bar chart.

components.name: ChartArea
components.purpose: Compare non-negative numeric values; currently rendered with the shared bar-chart visualization.

components.name: ChartLine
components.purpose: Compare non-negative numeric values; currently rendered with the shared bar-chart visualization.

components.name: ChartPie
components.purpose: Compare non-negative numeric values; currently rendered with the shared bar-chart visualization.

components.name: DataTable
components.purpose: Display structured records in rows and columns.

components.name: Compare
components.purpose: Place alternatives or contrasting concepts side by side.

components.name: Finding
components.purpose: Present key findings as a scannable list.

components.name: Evidence
components.purpose: List evidence that supports the surrounding analysis.
components.example:
<Evidence>
- **Runtime:** The allowlist currently lives in implementation code.
</Evidence>

components.name: Sources
components.purpose: Show the research artifacts a section draws on as a row of provenance pills (each prefixed with ↗). A **bold** item renders as the highlighted current-artifact pill.

components.name: Audience
components.purpose: Target-audience segments: the Primary segment renders as a wide tinted hero card with a metric row, the rest as a secondary grid. Item title is `Persona — Type` (Type: Primary | Secondary | Secondary · Risk); the text is `Description · metrics: value — caption; … · priority: High|Medium|Unmeasured`.
components.example:
<Audience>
- **Self-Creator · Custom Goods Merchant — Primary:** Sells made-to-order products and needs a file from the shopper at purchase. · metrics: ~19.8K — stores above $50K GPV; 4.85% — of ~408K active stores · priority: High
- **Partner / Freelancer — Secondary:** Hits the upload gap on every relevant client build. · priority: Medium
</Audience>

components.name: IntentList
components.purpose: Group user intents by priority (Blocker/Critical/Nice to have) with a persona · type header, the intent quote, and current → expected feeling chips (red → green). Each item title is `#id · Priority · Persona · Type`; the text is the quote followed by `negative, negative → positive, positive`. Append an optional `· note: …` to flag an intent with a caution strip (e.g. a guardrail) inside its card.
components.example:
<IntentList>
- **#int-001 · Blocker · Self-Creator · Main intent:** "I want to collect a shopper's file at purchase, so the attachment is tied to the order." — frustrated, resigned → in control, relieved
- **#int-001 · Critical · Shopper · Main intent:** "I want to attach my file while buying, so the seller gets exactly what I mean." — uncertain, friction → understood, reassured · note: Required-upload step is an unmeasured conversion risk — guardrail KPI required at launch
</IntentList>

components.name: SignalGrid
components.purpose: A grid of category cards with a colored top accent — for Why-Now signals or a Problem / Root cause / Opportunity trio. Item title is `Category | tone` (tone: blue/green/amber/red/gray/purple); the text is an optional `Headline — ` followed by the body.
components.example:
<SignalGrid>
- **User pain · Escalated | red:** Paying for a workaround — merchants pay $14–60/mo and escalate to support.
- **Competitive gap | amber:** 4 of 6 native competitors ship upload — Wix does not.
</SignalGrid>

components.name: DecisionMatrix
components.purpose: Compare solution options as columns against criteria as rows. The header lists options (first cell is the criteria corner); put a ✓ in the chosen option header to highlight its column and badge it "Chosen". A cell may lead with `[green]`/`[amber]`/`[red]` to show a colored effort dot.
components.example:
<DecisionMatrix>
| Criterion | A — Text workaround | B — Native FILE_UPLOAD ✓ | C — Partner app |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| User fit | Partial | [green] Fully solves the intent | Partial |
| Build effort | [green] Low | [amber] Medium | [red] High |
</DecisionMatrix>

components.name: OpenQuestions
components.purpose: An amber-framed panel of open questions and assumptions, each row carrying a labeled badge. Item title is the label (Assumption = blue, Risk = red, Open = amber); the text is the note.
components.example:
<OpenQuestions>
- **Assumption:** FILE_UPLOAD render type on the Catalog V3 Modifier mechanism. To be confirmed in spec.
- **Risk:** Required-before-add-to-cart carries an unmeasured buyer-conversion risk. Guardrail KPI at launch.
- **Open:** Order-carriage path and buyer-file retention policy are deferred to spec.
</OpenQuestions>

components.name: RiskTable
components.purpose: Classify priorities using the canonical product-planning tiers.
components.example:
<RiskTable>
- **Must-have:** Publish exact-version metadata.
- **Not now:** Describe host components.
</RiskTable>

components.name: DecisionTable
components.purpose: Present decision criteria and their corresponding outcomes.
components.example:
<DecisionTable>
- Scope: Built-in components only
- Delivery: Versioned manifest
</DecisionTable>

components.name: Timeline
components.purpose: Describe milestones as labeled points in time.
components.example:
<Timeline>
- July: Publish the manifest
- August: Adopt it in validators
</Timeline>

components.name: Card
components.purpose: Container for a self-contained block of content.
components.example:
<Card>
  <CardHeader>
    <CardTitle>Revenue</CardTitle>
    <CardDescription>Quarterly numbers</CardDescription>
  </CardHeader>
  <CardContent>
Grew **12%** quarter over quarter.
  </CardContent>
  <CardFooter>
    <Button variant="outline" size="sm">Details</Button>
  </CardFooter>
</Card>

components.name: CardHeader
components.purpose: Header area of a Card; holds CardTitle and CardDescription.

components.name: CardTitle
components.purpose: Title line inside CardHeader.

components.name: CardDescription
components.purpose: Muted description line inside CardHeader.

components.name: CardAction
components.purpose: Action slot aligned to the end of CardHeader.

components.name: CardContent
components.purpose: Main body of a Card; markdown and components allowed.

components.name: CardFooter
components.purpose: Footer row of a Card, usually Buttons or Badges.

components.name: Badge
components.purpose: Small status or label chip.

components.name: Button
components.purpose: Button-styled element. Inert in artifacts: function props cannot be expressed.

components.name: Tabs
components.purpose: Interactive tab group; state lives inside the component.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: value of the initially active tab

components.example:
<Tabs defaultValue="a">
  <TabsList>
    <TabsTrigger value="a">First</TabsTrigger>
    <TabsTrigger value="b">Second</TabsTrigger>
  </TabsList>
  <TabsContent value="a">First panel.</TabsContent>
  <TabsContent value="b">Second panel.</TabsContent>
</Tabs>

components.name: TabsList
components.purpose: Row of TabsTrigger elements inside Tabs.

components.name: TabsTrigger
components.purpose: Clickable tab label.

components.name: TabsContent
components.purpose: Panel shown when its value matches the active tab.

components.name: Accordion
components.purpose: Expandable sections; state lives inside the component.

props.name: collapsible
props.description: bare attribute; allows closing the open item

components.name: AccordionItem
components.purpose: One expandable section inside Accordion.

components.name: AccordionTrigger
components.purpose: Clickable header that toggles its AccordionItem.

components.name: AccordionContent
components.purpose: Body revealed when the AccordionItem is open.

components.name: Alert
components.purpose: Callout banner for a titled note or warning. Display-only.

components.name: AlertTitle
components.purpose: Bold title line inside an Alert.

components.name: AlertDescription
components.purpose: Body text inside an Alert.

components.name: AspectRatio
components.purpose: Locks its child to a fixed width:height ratio. Display-only.

components.name: Avatar
components.purpose: Round avatar container; holds AvatarImage and AvatarFallback. Display-only.

components.name: AvatarImage
components.purpose: Avatar photo; falls back to AvatarFallback when it fails to load.

components.name: AvatarFallback
components.purpose: Initials or icon shown when AvatarImage is unavailable.

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.purpose: Breadcrumb navigation trail. Display-only.

components.name: BreadcrumbList
components.purpose: Ordered-list wrapper for breadcrumb items.

components.name: BreadcrumbItem
components.purpose: One entry in the breadcrumb trail.

components.name: BreadcrumbLink
components.purpose: Linked breadcrumb entry.

components.name: BreadcrumbPage
components.purpose: Current-page breadcrumb entry (not a link).

components.name: BreadcrumbSeparator
components.purpose: Chevron between breadcrumb items.

components.name: BreadcrumbEllipsis
components.purpose: Collapsed-items indicator in a breadcrumb.

components.name: Collapsible
components.purpose: Single expandable region toggled by CollapsibleTrigger; state lives inside.

components.name: CollapsibleTrigger
components.purpose: Element that expands/collapses the CollapsibleContent.

components.name: CollapsibleContent
components.purpose: Region shown when the Collapsible is open.

components.name: Dialog
components.purpose: Modal dialog opened by DialogTrigger; content renders in a portal over an overlay.
components.example:
<Dialog>
  <DialogTrigger>
    <Button variant="outline">Open dialog</Button>
  </DialogTrigger>
  <DialogContent>
    <DialogHeader>
      <DialogTitle>Confirm</DialogTitle>
      <DialogDescription>This is a real modal.</DialogDescription>
    </DialogHeader>
    <DialogFooter>
      <DialogClose>
        <Button variant="outline">Close</Button>
      </DialogClose>
    </DialogFooter>
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>

components.name: DialogTrigger
components.purpose: Element that opens the Dialog on click.

components.name: DialogContent
components.purpose: Modal surface (portalled) holding header, body, and footer.

components.name: DialogHeader
components.purpose: Top area of DialogContent; holds title and description.

components.name: DialogFooter
components.purpose: Bottom action row of DialogContent.

components.name: DialogTitle
components.purpose: Accessible title of the Dialog.

components.name: DialogDescription
components.purpose: Muted description under the DialogTitle.

components.name: DialogClose
components.purpose: Element that closes the Dialog on click.

components.name: DialogOverlay
components.purpose: Dimmed backdrop behind the Dialog; rendered automatically by DialogContent.

components.name: DialogPortal
components.purpose: Portal host for Dialog layers; used internally by DialogContent.

components.name: HoverCard
components.purpose: Rich card revealed on hover of HoverCardTrigger.

components.name: HoverCardTrigger
components.purpose: Element that opens the HoverCardContent on hover.

components.name: HoverCardContent
components.purpose: Floating card body, portalled to the document.

components.name: Popover
components.purpose: Click-triggered floating panel; state lives inside.

components.name: PopoverTrigger
components.purpose: Element that toggles the PopoverContent on click.

components.name: PopoverContent
components.purpose: Floating panel body, portalled to the document.

components.name: PopoverAnchor
components.purpose: Optional custom positioning anchor for PopoverContent.

components.name: Progress
components.purpose: Determinate progress bar. Display-only.

components.name: Separator
components.purpose: Thin dividing rule between sections. Display-only.

components.name: Table
components.purpose: Data table root; wrap TableHeader/TableBody rows. Display-only.

components.name: TableHeader
components.purpose: Header section (thead) of a Table.

components.name: TableBody
components.purpose: Body section (tbody) holding data rows.

components.name: TableFooter
components.purpose: Footer section (tfoot), usually totals.

components.name: TableRow
components.purpose: One row (tr) inside a Table section.

components.name: TableHead
components.purpose: Header cell (th) inside a TableRow.

components.name: TableCell
components.purpose: Data cell (td) inside a TableRow.

components.name: TableCaption
components.purpose: Caption line rendered under the Table.

components.name: Tooltip
components.purpose: Hover tooltip; wraps its own provider so it works standalone. Shows on hover of TooltipTrigger.

components.name: TooltipTrigger
components.purpose: Element that reveals the TooltipContent on hover/focus.

components.name: TooltipContent
components.purpose: Floating tooltip body, portalled to the document.

components.name: TooltipProvider
components.purpose: Optional shared tooltip config wrapper; Tooltip includes one by default.
